title: Anatomy of an Ethereum Message Call Transaction
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequential steps and components involved in a message call transaction, from initiation by an EOA to state change execution by the EVM.
relationships: EOA signs and broadcasts a transaction targeting Contract A
Transaction is validated and included in a block
EVM executes the call, which may read from or write to the World State
A internal message call can be made from Contract A to Contract B
Execution results and gas usage are finalized
